evals.name: broadleaf-orders-targeted
evals.prompt: Extract the system requirements for the order management area of this Broadleaf Commerce codebase. Focus on the order lifecycle: placement, confirmation, shipping, delivery, and cancellation.
evals.expected_output: A .sysreq file with EARS requirements covering the order lifecycle: placement (event-driven), state transitions (state-driven), cancellation guards (unwanted), and any infrastructure NFRs found in the order area.

evals.name: url-shortener-full
evals.prompt: Extract all system requirements from this URL shortener project.
evals.expected_output: A complete .sysreq file covering: URL creation, redirection, analytics, expiration, and any NFRs. Should be a small, focused requirement set.

evals.name: broadleaf-payment-targeted
evals.prompt: What are the system requirements for the payment processing in this codebase?
evals.expected_output: A .sysreq file with EARS requirements for payment: capture, refund, failure handling, payment method validation, and security NFRs.
